get.description: Retrieve a list of all credentials in the system.

post.description: save encrypted credential.

get.description: Get the details of a Credential using its ID.

delete.description: Delete an existing credential using its ID.

put.description:
Creates a table (collection) with the given name. If the table already exists the request is a no-op.
Supported providers: aws (DynamoDB), gcp (Firestore), ncp (MongoDB), alibaba (MongoDB).
put.summary: Create a table in a NRDBMS instance

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and table name
parameters.name: RequestBody

post.description:
Returns the list of tables (collections) accessible with the given credentials.
Supported providers: aws (DynamoDB), gcp (Firestore), ncp (MongoDB), alibaba (MongoDB).
post.summary: List tables in a NRDBMS instance

delete.description:
Deletes the table (collection) with the given name and all its data.
Supported providers: aws (DynamoDB), gcp (Firestore), ncp (MongoDB), alibaba (MongoDB).
delete.summary: Delete a table from a NRDBMS instance

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and table name
parameters.name: RequestBody

put.description:
Provisions a new managed database instance for the requested CSP.
Only AWS with mysql/mariadb engines is supported. The instance is created publicly accessible.

post.description:
Returns managed database instances for the requested CSP and region.
Credentials are resolved by provider (one credential per CSP). Only AWS is supported for now.
post.summary: List RDB (database) instances for a given provider

delete.description: Deletes the database instance identified by instanceId. The final snapshot is skipped.

post.description:
Connects directly to the database instance using the target connection
info and returns the names of the databases it contains (SHOW DATABASES).
post.summary: List databases inside an RDB instance

parameters.description: Target connection info (host, port, username, password)
parameters.name: RequestBody

post.description: Returns available mysql and mariadb engine versions for the requested CSP and region.
Returns the instance classes orderable for the given engine and version.

post.description: Sets the runtime nsId received from the parent page via postMessage

put.description: Creates a bucket for the given provider. If the bucket already exists, the request is a no-op.

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and bucket name
parameters.name: RequestBody

delete.description: Empties the bucket by deleting all objects (in batches of 1000), then deletes the bucket itself.
delete.summary: Delete a bucket and all its objects

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and bucket name
parameters.name: RequestBody

put.description: Creates a bucket for the given provider. If the bucket already exists, the request is a no-op.

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and bucket name
parameters.name: RequestBody

post.description: Returns the list of buckets accessible with the given credentials. Optionally filters by a tag key/value pair.
post.summary: List available buckets for a given provider

parameters.description: Tag key to filter buckets by
parameters.name: filterKey

parameters.description: Tag value to filter buckets by (used with filterKey)
parameters.name: filterVal

delete.description: Empties the bucket by deleting all objects (in batches of 1000), then deletes the bucket itself.
delete.summary: Delete a bucket and all its objects

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and bucket name
parameters.name: RequestBody

delete.description: Deletes the object identified by objectKey from the bucket specified by the target connection.
delete.summary: Delete a single object from a bucket

parameters.description: Target connection info and key of the object to delete
parameters.name: RequestBody

post.description: Returns all objects stored in the bucket specified by the target connection. Supports optional filter parameters.

parameters.description: Provider credentials, connection info, and optional sourceFilter
parameters.name: RequestBody

200.description: List of objects in the bucket
